item.title: v1.2
item.description:
Pick your agent, per character

Bruce and Jazz can now each run a different AI provider. Click the title in any chat popover to switch between Claude, Codex, Copilot, Gemini, or OpenCode — or set them all at once from the menu bar. Unavailable providers are automatically detected and grayed out.

Fresh starts with /clear

Type /clear or hit the ↻ button to reset a conversation and start a new session instantly — no need to quit and relaunch.

Resize your agents

A new Size menu lets you switch between Large, Medium, and Small characters.

Multi-display fixes

  • Characters no longer vanish when you click a secondary monitor
  • Dock detection now works when the Dock is pinned to the left or right, not just the bottom
  • Pinning characters to a specific display always keeps them visible

More providers

  • Gemini support
  • OpenCode support
